addxp.metadata_description: Add or remove XP from a member. (requires manage server permission)
addxp.args_xp_description: How much XP to add (negative number to remove XP)
addxp.args_operation_description: How the XP amount should be interpreted
addxp.noBots: You can't give XP to bots, silly!
addxp.error: Something went wrong while trying to modify XP!

botstatus.metadata_description: View some details about the bot
botstatus.creator: **Original creator:** **[Colon](https://gdcolon.com)** 🦊⛩️

calculate.metadata_description: Check how much XP you need to reach a certain level.
calculate.miniFooter: Rank cards are disabled, so calculations are hidden!
calculate.maxLevel: 🎉 You reached the maximum level{inServer}! Congratulations!
calculate.noMultiplier: Your multiplier prevents you from gaining any XP!

clear.metadata_description: Clear a member's cooldown. (requires manage server permission)
clear.noCooldown: This member doesn't have an active cooldown!
clear.error: Something went wrong while trying to reset the cooldown!

config.metadata_description: Toggle XP gain, or visit the dashboard to tweak server settings. (requires manage server permission)
config.embedFooter: Visit the online dashboard to change server settings

multiplier.metadata_description: Add or remove an XP multiplier. (requires manage server permission)
multiplier.args_role_desc: Add or remove a role multiplier
multiplier.args_role_name_desc: The role to add a multiplier for
multiplier.args_mult_desc: Multiply XP gain by this amount (0.5, 2, etc), or 0 to disable XP gain
multiplier.args_remove_desc: Removes this multiplier, if it exists
multiplier.args_channel_desc: Add or remove a channel multiplier
multiplier.args_channel_name_desc: The channel or category to add a multiplier for
multiplier.neverHad: This {type} never had a multiplier to begin with!

rank.metadata_description: View your current XP, level, and cooldown.
rank.args_hidden_desc: Hides the reply so only you can see it
rank.disabled: Rank cards are disabled in this server!
rank.unableToGain: You are unable to gain XP!
rank.syncWarning: Your level roles are not properly synced! Type {command} to fix this.

rewardrole.metadata_description: Add or remove a reward role. (requires manage server permission)
rewardrole.args_role_desc: The role to add or remove
rewardrole.args_level_desc: The level to grant the role at, or 0 to remove
rewardrole.args_keep_desc: Keep this role even when a higher one is reached
rewardrole.args_dontsync_desc: Advanced: Ignores this role when syncing roles
rewardrole.levelZeroError: Reward roles can't be granted at level 0! Use this to delete existing reward roles.
rewardrole.noPerms: I don't have permission to grant {role}!
rewardrole.alreadyGranted: This role is already granted at level {level}!
rewardrole.updated: 📝 **{role} will now be granted at level {level}!** (previously {oldLevel}){extraStr}
rewardrole.added: ✅ **{role} will now be granted at level {level}!**{extraStr}

sync.metadata_description: Sync your level roles by adding missing ones and removing incorrect ones.
sync.args_member_desc: Which member to sync (requires manage server permission)
sync.noPermOther: You don't have permission to sync someone else's roles!
sync.noPermSelf: You don't have permission to sync your level roles!
sync.noRoles: This server doesn't have any reward roles!
sync.alreadySynced: ✅ Your level roles are already properly synced!

top.args_page_desc: Which page to view (negative to start from last page)
top.args_member_desc: Finds a certain member's position on the leaderboard (overrides page)
top.args_hidden_desc: Hides the reply so only you can see it
top.nobodyRanked: Nobody in this server is ranked yet!
top.disabled: The leaderboard is disabled in this server!
top.modView: As a moderator, you can still privately view the leaderboard here: {link}
top.nobodyOnLB: Nobody in this server is on the leaderboard yet!
top.memberNotOnLB: This member isn't on the leaderboard!
top.noMembersPage: There are no members on this page!
